plugins.name: build-fixer-plugin
plugins.description: Iteratively fixes build errors and lint warnings until the project compiles cleanly. Supports .NET, Node.js, Rust, Go, Java, Make, and more.

plugins.name: design-system-aurora-plugin
plugins.description: Glass Aurora design system — ethereal glassmorphism, aurora gradients, neon glows, and a purple-cyan color scheme for consistent UI components.

plugins.name: e2e-test-runner-fixer-plugin
plugins.description: Diagnoses and fixes end-to-end test failures with deterministic setup, isolation, and iterative reruns. Supports Playwright, Cypress, and WebDriver.

plugins.name: issue-closer-plugin
plugins.description: Reviews open GitHub issues and closes any where the work has been fully completed and checked in.

plugins.name: issue-prioritiser-plugin
plugins.description: Reviews open GitHub issues, applies priority labels, checks relevance, and recommends the next issues to work on.

plugins.name: issue-worker-plugin
plugins.description: Implements a GitHub issue end-to-end — reads the issue, explores the project, writes code, adds tests, and verifies everything passes.

plugins.name: sdlc-plugin
plugins.description: Software Development Lifecycle skills, bundled. Fifteen skills covering bootstrap → solution design → platform → requirements → tasks → implementation, plus audit and course-correction utilities: /repo-bootstrap (new GitHub repo from scratch), /solution-design (first-stab combined business + technical solution view, written to docs/design/solution-design.md — bridges README and docs/architecture/), /platform-design (deeper architectural design into docs/architecture/ — bridges solution-design and requirements), /platform-provision (stands up the cloud/SaaS platforms the architecture names — tries every available channel including connected MCP servers, CLIs, and APIs; batches human-only steps into a single checklist; wires resulting secrets into GitHub Actions and platform env stores), /platform-verify (smoke test + security pass on the provisioned platform — reachability, secret hygiene, CI wiring, security posture), /repo-release-ready (release/uat + release/prod branches, promotion workflows, secret scanning, branch-protection rulesets), /requirements-create-from-design (interactively elicit functional + non-functional requirements into docs/requirements/ — solution-design as primary source, README/interactive as fallback), /requirements-validation (validate and advance the status of existing requirements, cross-checked against docs/architecture/), /tasks-create-from-requirements (staged plan of small-batch GitHub issues), /task-implement (heavyweight end-to-end implementation of one GitHub issue via a multi-persona orchestration that reads docs/architecture/ and includes a UX/UI Designer with Playwright verification), /status-help (analyses repo state and recommends the next concrete step in the SDLC workflow), /requirements-add (add a single new requirement with duplicate + conflict checks and full elaboration), /requirements-delete (remove or demote a single requirement with a full cascade-impact scan and explicit approval gate), /ai-check-work (generic 'please just check your work carefully' second-pass skill — works on anything, saves typing the phrase), /requirements-rework (assertively course-correct requirements and issues when an implementation-time discovery invalidates the plan).

plugins.name: sentry-recent-issues-plugin
plugins.description: Investigates recent or specific Sentry issues, determines frequency and recurrence, researches root cause in the codebase, and recommends fixes.

plugins.name: teams-to-confluence-plugin
plugins.description: Adds a /teams-to-confluence skill for taking Teams chat content and creating/updating Confluence pages

plugins.name: write-like-a-human-plugin
plugins.description: Write prose that sounds authentically human and avoids detectable AI patterns. Covers vocabulary, punctuation, structure, and tone.
